title: EF-Protectparry
description: It provides an enhanced parrying skill that can block nearly all damage and grants buff effects when parrying successfully/inflicts debuff effects on the enemy.
body:
This is an addon module for the Epic fight. 

The author enjoys playing Epic Fight and is particularly fond of parrying. However, in modpacks, I often encountered many modded monsters whose magical attacks couldn’t be blocked at all, which led them to create this mod.

It provides an enhanced parrying skill that can block nearly all damage and grants buff effects when parrying successfully/inflicts debuff effects on the enemy.（By default, it grants Haste II and Regeneration I / Slowness and Mining Fatigue.） Multiple parameters and effects of this skill can be modified through the configuration file.

The configurable items are as follows:

-the duration of the parry window

-the stamina penalty for successful/failed parries,

-the knockback received from parrying source-less damage

- the type of damage blocked (full block, block everything except blacklisted damage, EF default blocking),

-the potion effects applied to the player upon a successful parry (type, level, and duration), and the potion effects applied to the enemy upon a successful parry (type, level, and duration).



这是一个史诗战斗的小附属

作者喜欢赤史诗战斗而且喜欢招架，但是整合包里老有魔伤怪，故写此mod，万物皆可招架——此外还给予了招架成功时给予自身和对方药水效果的功能，默认配置是急迫二再生一/缓慢和挖掘疲劳

提供了一个增强版的招架技能，可以通过铁剑，钻石和书无序合成（随手写的配方...），能够格挡绝大部分伤害和给予药水效果

此外可以通过配置文件修改很多参数

可以通过配置文件修改的项目如下

-招架窗口时长

-招架成功/失败的耐力惩罚

-招架无来源伤害时所受的冲击力

-格挡伤害的类型（这里有三种模式，全类型格挡,黑名单内的伤害不格挡,ef原版格挡）

-招架成功时给玩家赋予的药水效果（种类，等级和时长），招架成功时对敌人赋予的药水效果（种类，等级和时长），可以写多个效果.
